ns0:entry.ns0:title: FastFlowLM/FastFlowLM
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/FastFlowLM/FastFlowLM
Language: c++
Run LLMs on AMD Ryzen™ AI NPUs in minutes. Just like Ollama - but purpose-built and deeply optimized for the AMD NPUs.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: M2Team/NanaZip
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/M2Team/NanaZip
Language: c++
The 7-Zip derivative intended for the modern Windows experience

ns0:entry.ns0:title: MaaXYZ/MaaFramework
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/MaaXYZ/MaaFramework
Language: c++
基于图像识别的自动化黑盒测试框架 | An automation black-box testing framework based on image recognition

ns0:entry.ns0:title: OrcaSlicer/OrcaSlicer
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/OrcaSlicer/OrcaSlicer
Language: c++
G-code generator for 3D printers (Bambu, Prusa, Voron, VzBot, RatRig, Creality, etc.)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: TixiaoShan/LIO-SAM
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/TixiaoShan/LIO-SAM
Language: c++
LIO-SAM: Tightly-coupled Lidar Inertial Odometry via Smoothing and Mapping

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ValveSoftware/GameNetworkingSockets
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ValveSoftware/GameNetworkingSockets
Language: c++
Reliable & unreliable messages over UDP. Robust message fragmentation & reassembly. P2P networking / NAT traversal. Encryption.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: WinMerge/winmerge
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/WinMerge/winmerge
Language: c++
WinMerge is an Open Source differencing and merging tool for Windows. WinMerge can compare both folders and files, presenting differences in a visual text format that is easy to understand and handle.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dragonflydb/dragonfly
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dragonflydb/dragonfly
Language: c++
A modern replacement for Redis and Memcached

ns0:entry.ns0:title: duckdb/duckdb
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/duckdb/duckdb
Language: c++
DuckDB is an analytical in-process SQL database management system

ns0:entry.ns0:title: grpc/grpc
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/grpc/grpc
Language: c++
C++ based gRPC (C++, Python, Ruby, Objective-C, PHP, C#)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: hyperfield/ai-file-sorter
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/hyperfield/ai-file-sorter
Language: c++
Cross-platform desktop application for content-aware file organization and renaming. Supports local and remote LLMs, preview-based workflows, and fully user-controlled changes.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: imputnet/helium
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/imputnet/helium
Language: c++
Private, fast, and honest web browser

ns0:entry.ns0:title: k2-fsa/sherpa-onnx
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/k2-fsa/sherpa-onnx
Language: c++
Speech-to-text, text-to-speech, speaker diarization, speech enhancement, source separation, and VAD using next-gen Kaldi with onnxruntime without Internet connection. Support embedded systems, Android, iOS, HarmonyOS, Raspberry Pi, RISC-V, RK NPU, Axera NPU, Ascend NPU, x86_64 servers, websocket server/client, support 12 programming languages

ns0:entry.ns0:title: kvcache-ai/Mooncake
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/kvcache-ai/Mooncake
Language: c++
Mooncake is the serving platform for Kimi, a leading LLM service provided by Moonshot AI.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: notepad-plus-plus/notepad-plus-plus
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/notepad-plus-plus/notepad-plus-plus

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/shadps4-emu/shadPS4
Language: c++
PlayStation 4 emulator for Windows, Linux, macOS and FreeBSD written in C++

ns0:entry.ns0:title: skypjack/entt
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/skypjack/entt
Language: c++
Gaming meets modern C++ - a fast and reliable entity component system (ECS) and much more

ns0:entry.ns0:title: sonic-net/sonic-swss
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/sonic-net/sonic-swss
Language: c++

ns0:entry.ns0:title: stephenberry/glaze
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/stephenberry/glaze
Language: c++
Extremely fast, in memory, serialization, reflection, and RPC library for C++. JSON, BEVE, BSON, CBOR, CSV, JSONB, MessagePack, TOML, YAML, EETF
